title: SNC Subsidiary Success: SNC Tallimat, LLC
summary: We are proud to share that SNC Tallimat, LLC (under our new subsidiary, SNC Global) was awarded a contract with the National Park Service in Lake Mead, Nevada. title: AST Death Investigation: Fairbanks [AK25042656]

title: AST Possession and Distribution of Child Sexual Abuse Material: Anchorage [AK25026588]
incident_type: Possession and Distribution of Child Sexual Abuse Material
summary: On May 5, 2025, Task Force Dawnbreaker (Alaska Bureau of Investigation Technical Crime Unit, and U.S. Department of Homeland Security Investigation) arrested Robert Campbell (age 57 of Anchorage) during a child sexual abuse material investigation. An investigation into Campbell revealed thousands of CSAM files in his possession. Campbell was arrested on one (1) count of Distribution of CSAM, and five (5) counts of Possession of CSAM. Campbell was remanded to Anchorage Correctional Complex on no bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
topic: Possession and Distribution of Child Sexual Abuse Material
